recommendations.title: Lonesome Ghosts
recommendations.overview: On a dark and stormy night, four bored ghosts decide to have some fun by calling the Ajax Ghost Exterminators.

recommendations.title: Flowers and Trees
recommendations.overview: A jealous stump threatens two trees that are in love by starting a forest fire. When the rain comes and puts out the fire the forest revives and celebrates the wedding.

recommendations.title: Mickey and the Beanstalk
recommendations.overview: A mysterious thief has stolen the prosperous Happy Valley's most prized possession: the musical Singing Harp. Can Mickey, Donald, and Goofy find the answer in the irritable Willie the Giant's magnificent castle up in the blue sky?

recommendations.title: The Big Bad Wolf
recommendations.overview: The Big Bad Wolf torments Little Red Riding Hood and the Three Little Pigs.

recommendations.title: Fantasia
recommendations.overview: Walt Disney's timeless masterpiece is an extravaganza of sight and sound! See the music come to life, hear the pictures burst into song and experience the excitement that is Fantasia over and over again.
recommendations.director: Jim Handley, James Algar, Norman Ferguson, Bill Roberts, Ben Sharpsteen, David Hand, Paul Satterfield, Wilfred Jackson, Ford Beebe Jr., Hamilton Luske, T. Hee, Samuel Armstrong

recommendations.title: Fun and Fancy Free
recommendations.overview: Jiminy Cricket hosts two Disney animated shorts: Bongo about a circus bear escaping to the wild, and Mickey and the Beanstalk, a take on the famous fairy tale.
recommendations.director: Bill Roberts, Jack Kinney, Hamilton Luske, William Morgan

recommendations.title: Pinocchio
recommendations.overview: When the gentle woodcarver Geppetto builds a marionette to be his substitute son, a benevolent fairy brings the toy to life. The puppet, named Pinocchio, is not yet a human boy. He must earn the right to be real by proving that he is brave, truthful,
recommendations.director: Norman Ferguson, Wilfred Jackson, Bill Roberts, Jack Kinney, T. Hee, Ben Sharpsteen, Hamilton Luske

recommendations.title: Three Little Pigs
recommendations.overview: The two pigs building houses of hay and sticks scoff at their brother, building the brick house. But when the wolf comes around and blows their houses down (after trickery like dressing as a foundling sheep fails), they run to their brother's house.

recommendations.title: Steamboat Willie
recommendations.overview: Mickey Mouse, piloting a steamboat, delights his passenger, Minnie Mouse, by making musical instruments out of the menagerie on deck.

recommendations.title: Mickey's House of Villains
recommendations.overview: The villains from the popular animated Disney films are gathered at the House of Mouse with plans to take over. Soon, the villains take over the house and kick out Mickey, Donald and Goofy. It's all up to Mickey and his friends to overthrow evil and
recommendations.director: Bobs Gannaway, Jamie Mitchell, Jack Hannah, Mike Moon, Tony Craig, Burt Gillett, Rick Schneider, Jack King
